# .github

## Overview

This directory contains GitHub-specific configuration for the multi-agent PPM platform repository, including CI/CD workflow definitions, issue templates, code ownership rules, and dependency management settings.

## Directory structure

| Folder | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [issue_template/](./issue_template/) | GitHub issue templates (bug report, feature request, security, docs) |
| [workflows/](./workflows/) | CI/CD workflow definitions |

## Key files

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [CODEOWNERS](./CODEOWNERS) | Code ownership rules for pull request reviews |
| [dependabot.yml](./dependabot.yml) | Dependabot dependency update configuration |
| [pull_request_template.md](./pull_request_template.md) | Default pull request template |
